Why Binder

Print quality you can feel

Every book is made to the same exacting standard.

True CMYK colour
We print in CMYK at 300 DPI — the same standard used by professional photo labs worldwide.
Premium binding
Our premium binding ensures every spread lies flat and opens beautifully.
Free online editor
No software to install. Design entirely in your browser with drag-and-drop simplicity.
5–7 day delivery
From your design to your doorstep in under a week, delivered anywhere in India.
Printed by Binder

The process

Simple from start to finish

1
Upload your photos
Choose from your camera roll, Google Photos, or drag photos directly into the editor.
2
Design your spreads
Lay out photos across 20 pages. Choose fonts, add captions, pick your cover.
3
We print it
Your file goes to our print studio in Okhla, Delhi. 300 DPI · CMYK · Hardcover.
4
Delivered to you
Carefully packaged and delivered anywhere in India within 5–7 working days.
